name: solverfin
description: Controle financeiro inteligente da SolverIT para pessoas, MEIs, autônomos e pequenos negócios.

scripts.dev:web: npm run build:packages && npm run dev --workspace @solverfin/web
scripts.dev:api: node scripts/prepare-local-env.mjs && npm run build:packages && npm run dev --workspace @solverfin/api
scripts.db:seed: npm run build:packages && node scripts/prepare-local-env.mjs && node scripts/seed-demo.mjs && node scripts/seed-default-categories.mjs
scripts.db:repair:default-categories: npm run build:packages && node scripts/prepare-local-env.mjs && node scripts/seed-default-categories.mjs
scripts.db:setup: npm run db:migrate && npm run db:seed
scripts.format:check: prettier packages/domain/src/card-instruments.ts packages/domain/src/card-instruments.test.ts --write && git diff -- packages/domain/src/card-instruments.ts packages/domain/src/card-instruments.test.ts && exit 1
scripts.lint: npm run build:packages && npm run lint --workspaces --if-present
scripts.typecheck: npm run build:packages && npm run typecheck --workspaces --if-present
scripts.test: npm run build:packages && npm run test --workspaces --if-present
scripts.test:integration: npm run build:packages && npm run db:deploy && npm run db:seed && npm run test:integration --workspace @solverfin/api
scripts.build: npm run build:packages && npm run build --workspace @solverfin/api --workspace @solverfin/web
scripts.validate: npm run env:check && npm run prisma:validate && npm run db:seed:check && npm run format:check && npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run build
